title: Fix typedef derived from type defined inside interface (#3441)
body:
This would support the following:
```
typedef if0.rq_t p0_rq_t;  (different name)
typedef if0.rq_t rq_t; (same name)
typedef y_if0.x_if_a[0].rq_t rq_t; (nested - with arrayed instance)
typedef z_if0.x_if0.rq_t rq_t; (simple nested)
```
This piggybacks almost exclusively on the `localparam type rq_t = IFACEA.IFACEn.rq_t;` plumbing.

I still have some cleanup to do and some more tests to write once I know that everything is clean.
